name: Silva & Aegis
description: This fiery sword and shield combination perfects the balance of Tenno offense and defense prowess. In the hands of a Master, even a defensive tool like a shield can be used as a weapon.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This fiery sword and shield combination perfects the balance of Tenno offense and defense prowess. In the hands of a Master, even a defensive tool like a shield can be used as a weapon.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes: In the above example, sword and shield weapons (such as the Silva & Aegis) have a blocking angle of 70 degrees, centered on the front of the player, where as a dagger weapon (such as the Dark Dagger) will only have a blocking angle of 45 degrees. (Previously all weapons had a locked blocking angle of 45 degrees upon the introduction of Auto Blocking.)

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Reduced clipping of Silva & Aegis’s blade with the Danaus Sword & Shield Skin equipped.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some of Silva & Aegis' effects being visible when it's holstered/hidden.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.2.0 + 21.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Harrow holding a shield (Silva & Aegis, etc) in an ancient style which history has long since forgotten (probably because shields are not useful if you hold them backwards).

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Silva & Aegis Prime not playing burst FXs on hit for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.6.4
patchlogs.changes: The Silva & Aegis Prime mace now spins while equipped and will increase/decrease when swinging/idle! I’m sure there is a Fidget Spinner joke in there somewhere...

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.6.2
patchlogs.changes: Silva & Aegis no longer benefits from blocking Elemental attacks, as it was intended to be a function for the Ack & Brunt.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed energy colors showing improperly on the Silva & Aegis when previewing the weapon in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.8.0: Nyx Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with the Kronen and Silva & Aegis both not having a proper wall attack.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.fixes:
• Fixed Dendra armor colour not updating until you leave the attachments part of the Arsenal. This should also fix Ember’s FX, Nova’s helmets, Frost’s jets, Ember Prime’s flaming Mohawk, and the Silva & Aegis.
• Fixed Silva & Aegis Codex Diorama not having proper fire effects.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.9
patchlogs.changes: Added new animations for Silva & Aegis idles.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Altered the visual effects on the Silva & Aegis after casting an Ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.fixes: Silva & Aegis: This fiery sword and shield combination perfects the balance of Tenno offense and defense prowess. In the hands of a Master, even a defensive tool like a shield can be used as a deadly weapon. This new weapon uses a brand new Stance, 'Eleventh Storm'! Created from the concept of our Melee Design Contest winner: SilverBones.
